exhibits.name: Agencies/Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state administrators and agents for 26+ states.

exhibits.name: Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: Multi-unit development agreement template. Includes Development Schedule, covenants, territory, transfer, termination provisions.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Single-unit franchise agreement template (~60 pages). Governs all operational, financial, and legal obligations.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Operations Manual is 1,095 pages. Categories: Operating the Restaurant, Delivering the Menu, Job Aids, Executing Promotions. Content available digitally on iPads/Chromebooks.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited financial statements: FY2024 (year ended Sep 29, 2024), FY2023 (inception Jan 17, 2023 through Sep 30, 2023), and opening balance sheet (Apr 12, 2023). Two different auditor firms. Clean/unmodified opinions.

exhibits.name: Additional Information Required by Certain States
exhibits.notes: State-specific addenda for 15 states: CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, OH, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI. Key overrides include: noncompete modifications, general release limitations, termination protections, governing law overrides, choice of forum modifications.

exhibits.name: List of Open Franchises
exhibits.notes: 6 units, all in Albuquerque, NM. Single franchisee: Taco Cabana of New Mexico, Inc. (Melvin & Mary Sloan). Addresses and phone numbers provided.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Lists 14 states requiring registration. All effective dates blank (registration pending at issuance).

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: Two detachable receipt pages — return copy and franchisee copy. Franchise seller: John Ramsey.
